# Silence Dot ENV logs
DOTENV_CONFIG_QUIET=true

# Environment
NEXT_PUBLIC_NODE_ENV=development

# Ports
NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_PORT=1995

# URLs
NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL=http://localhost:1995

# AWS Config
NEXT_AWS_EMAIL_FROM=contact@rajeshranjan.dev
NEXT_AWS_EMAIL_TO=rajeshranjan8271@gmail.com
NEXT_AWS_DEV_EMAIL_OVERRIDE=rajeshranjan8271@gmail.com
NEXT_AWS_SES_REGION=ap-south-1
NEXT_AWS_SES_ACCESS_KEY_ID=
NEXT_AWS_SES_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=
